enabled.title: Enabled
enabled.description: Whether the JVN (Japan Vulnerability Notes) data source should be enabled.

feedBaseUrl.title: JVN data feed base URL
feedBaseUrl.description: Base URL of the JVN data feeds (the `.../ja/feed` directory). The yearly detail feeds (`detail/jvndb_detail_YYYY.rdf`) and `checksum.txt` are read from here. Defaults to `https://jvndb.jvn.jp/ja/feed`.

startYear.title: Backfill start year
startYear.description: First publication year to mirror from the yearly detail feeds (JVN iPedia data reaches back to 1998). Defaults to 1998.
